# Pong Party Games - Complete Guide

> Pong Party Games is the first patented baseball-inspired indoor/outdoor party game designed for all ages, handcrafted in the USA with American-made parts. It combines skill and luck in a portable, weather-resistant format perfect for tailgates, backyard parties, corporate events, travel baseball tournaments, and family gatherings. Founded by Mike Whelan. Available at pongpartygames.com.

## About the Product

Pong Party Games: Baseball Edition is a tabletop baseball game where players throw balls into cups arranged as a baseball diamond. Each cup represents a different hit: Single (1B), Double (2B), Triple (3B), and Home Run/Walk (HR). The game simulates a full baseball game with innings, outs, walks, base runners advancing, and scoring.

### What Makes It Unique
- First and only patented baseball-themed tailgate party game on the market
- Combines skill and luck so players of all ages and abilities can compete equally
- Kids can beat adults, beginners can beat veterans - everyone has a real chance to win
- Multiplayer format (1v1 or 2v2) keeps entire groups engaged, unlike 2-player lawn games
- Compact playing footprint works anywhere - parking lots, backyards, indoor event spaces
- No batteries, cords, or electricity required - 100% unplugged entertainment
- Tool-free assembly in under 5 minutes
- Weather-resistant premium PVC construction for year-round outdoor use
- Leveling legs with alignment bead system for play on uneven surfaces

### How to Play (Quick Summary)
1. Choose Home vs Visitors via coin flip. Visitors bat first.
2. Players throw balls from 6 feet (adults) or 4 feet (kids).
3. Balls landing in cups advance base runners accordingly.
4. Miss all cups = 1 out. Ball bounces off board = 2 outs. 3 outs end the inning.
5. Hit Single + Double + Triple in same inning = Home Run.
6. Maximum 2 walks per inning, then HR/Walk cup becomes foul.
7. Home team bats last with chance to tie or win.

### Pricing
- Baseball Edition: $319.99 (retail $395.99) - includes game panels, balls, leveling legs, and custom storage box
- Corporate Custom Edition: $419.99 (retail $495.99) - includes all standard features plus custom branded panels

## Comparisons with Other Tailgate Games

### vs Cornhole
Cornhole limits play to a few people at a time. Pong Party Games keeps the entire group involved with multiplayer gameplay.

### vs Beer Pong
Beer pong is adult-only. Pong Party Games is family-friendly and suitable for all ages from children to grandparents.

### vs Ladder Toss
Ladder toss is heavily skill-based. Pong Party Games balances skill and luck so everyone has a chance to win.

### vs KanJam, Spikeball, Bocce Ball
These require large playing spaces. Pong Party Games has a compact footprint that works in parking lots, small yards, and even indoors.

## Corporate Custom Games

Companies can customize Pong Party Games with:
- Company logos on 3 panels (1st base side, 3rd base side, scoreboard back)
- QR codes linking to company website
- Mission statements or promotional messaging
- Custom colors matching brand identity
- Logo placement in VIP box on field level

Ideal for: corporate events, trade shows, client entertainment, team building, brand activations, and promotional giveaways.

Notable corporate clients include 3Tree Marketing, Allstate, Carlson, and Rebel.

## Customer Reviews

Pong Party Games has a 5 out of 5 star average rating from verified customers. Customers frequently praise the game's portability, quality construction, family-friendly gameplay, and ability to entertain all ages at events ranging from backyard BBQs to travel baseball tournaments.
